_comment: Copy to config/bridge-map.json and replace ids with your instance ids plus channel/group/room ids. A route can list 2+ endpoints; messages fan out to every other endpoint in that group. Shared memory and relays stay disabled unless their feature flags are enabled.

instances._comment: Discord instance; url is used by the HTTP transport.
WhatsApp instance; url is used by the HTTP transport.
Telegram instance; url is used by the HTTP transport.
Matrix instance; url is used by the HTTP transport.

routes._comment: Bridge one conversation group across Discord, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Matrix. Commands are not relayed by default. Two-endpoint routes remain valid for simple pairs.
